title: Barclays Warns of Upside Risk to Its $100 Oil Price Forecast for 2026
summary: Risks to oil prices are firmly skewed higher amid plunging global oil inventories in the worst supply disruption in history, according to Barclays. title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
summary: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.
